steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.RuntimeException: Login is not completed
	at stepdefinitions.credentials.components.AbstractCredentialsSteps.enterCredentialsForLibraryAccount(AbstractCredentialsSteps.java:69)
	at stepdefinitions.credentials.CredentialsSteps.enterCredentialsForLibraryAccount(CredentialsSteps.java:44)

steps.name: Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
When  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  I open 'New BiblioBoard Test' category
And  Change books visibility to show AVAILABLE_NOW
And  Click GET action button on random book from the catalog book screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Save book name of the book 'bookInfo' as 'bookNameInfo' on catalog book screen
Then  I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen
When  Open book with LISTEN action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Tap play button on audio player screen
Then  Pause button is present on audio player screen
When  Tap pause button on audio player screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
When  I stretch slider on the time tracking line forward on audio player screen
And  Wait for 5 seconds
And  Save book play time as 'timeBehind' on audio player screen
And  I tap on the time bar forward on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeForward' on audio player screen
Then  Play times 'timeBehind' and 'timeForward' are equals
When  I tap on the time bar back on audio player screen
And  Save book play time as 'timeBackward' on audio player screen
Then  Play times 'timeBehind' and 'timeBackward' are equals

labels.name: story
labels.value: BiblioBoard: Check of not rewinding forward and back by tapping on time bar
